base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of aquamentus_idle — a character (boss) from 1986 legend of zelda. Aquamentus — green 1-horned dragon. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Aquamentus — green 1-horned dragon; boss of Level 1 (Eagle). 2-frame body-wave; shoots 3-way fireball spread (down/horizontal/up). 6 sword hits to defeat
